case_title: EDUARDO ABAD VS. HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ABAD, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABAD, EDUARDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ABAD, EDUARDO HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABAD, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-31-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EDUARDO ABAD IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY PROVISIONAL COURT CERTIFIED TAGALOG INTERPRETER DENNIS CASTRO. DEFENDANT HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MANUEL LOCK, DIRECTOR OF SECURITY. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY IT WAS DETERMINED BY JPT DAVID LAVINE THAT THERE WAS NO LIABILITY BY HOTEL NIKKO OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THAT PROPER LIABLE PARTY IS A DIFFERENT COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
